content: LangGraph memory pitfalls: (1) Unbounded growth — append-only memory fills context window; fix with custom reducers capping list to N items and TTL sweeps. (2) Stale facts — if user changes plan/state, old + new fact both persist and agent uses wrong one; fix with category-keyed upsert (key='user_plan') instead of UUID append. (3) Anonymous session ID collision/loss — localStorage ID is the only recovery mechanism; clearing browser destroys memory; design memory as 'enhanced, not required'. (4) Namespace collisions — different code paths writing to same user under different namespace keys see different data.
